description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant energy of New York City, where the iconic skyline meets rich cultural experiences. Over four days, you and your family will explore the bustling streets, indulge in delicious cuisine, and dive into the world of 'Sex and the City'—all while enjoying the unique charm of this unforgettable city. From shopping for fan merchandise to savoring local delicacies, this trip promises to be a delightful blend of culture, history, and fun.

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, famous for its fluffy pancakes and homemade jams. It's a cozy spot that captures the essence of New York mornings.
Stroll through Central Park, the green heart of Manhattan. Don't miss iconic spots like Bethesda Terrace and the Bow Bridge, perfect for a family photo op!
Enjoy lunch at The Loeb Boathouse, where you can dine with a view of the lake. Try their famous crab cakes or a refreshing salad while soaking in the park's beauty.
Wander down Fifth Avenue, a shopper's paradise. Visit flagship stores and boutiques, and don't forget to stop by the iconic Saks Fifth Avenue for some window shopping.

activities.activity: Visit the Sex and the City Hotspots
activities.description: Explore the famous spots from Sex and the City, including the iconic Magnolia Bakery for a cupcake and the 'Carrie' apartment building on Perry Street. A must for fans!
Indulge in a delicious dinner at Buddakan, known for its modern Asian cuisine. The ambiance is perfect for a family gathering after a day of exploring.
End your day with a visit to Times Square. The dazzling lights and vibrant atmosphere are a perfect way to experience the energy of New York City at night.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, famous for its fluffy pancakes and fresh fruit. It's a cozy spot that captures the essence of New York mornings, perfect for fueling up before your adventure.
Head to the iconic brownstone at 66 Perry Street, where Carrie Bradshaw lived in the series. Snap a photo in front of the building and soak in the atmosphere of this charming neighborhood.
Indulge in a sweet treat at Magnolia Bakery, known for its classic American baked goods. Don't miss their famous banana pudding, a favorite among fans of the show!
Explore The Pleasure Chest, a fun and cheeky store that offers a variety of adult toys and novelties. It's a playful nod to the show's themes and a great place to pick up some unique souvenirs.

Enjoy a leisurely lunch at The Smith, a lively American brasserie. Their menu features a variety of delicious options, from hearty salads to mouthwatering burgers, perfect for recharging after your morning adventures.
Take a relaxing stroll through Central Park, a beautiful oasis in the heart of the city. Enjoy the scenic views, and if you're lucky, you might catch a glimpse of a film crew shooting nearby!

activities.activity: Visit the New York Public Library
activities.description: Explore the stunning New York Public Library, a historic landmark with beautiful architecture. It's a peaceful spot to unwind and appreciate the literary history of the city.
End your day with a fabulous dinner at Buddakan, an upscale Asian fusion restaurant. The ambiance is vibrant, and the food is exquisite, making it a perfect spot to reflect on your day.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh fruit. The cozy atmosphere makes it a perfect spot to fuel up for a day of exploration.

activities.activity: Visit the Metropolitan Museum of Art
activities.description: Immerse yourself in art and culture at the Metropolitan Museum of Art. With its vast collection spanning 5,000 years, you can explore everything from ancient artifacts to modern masterpieces. Don't miss the rooftop garden for stunning views of Central Park!

Head to Chelsea Market for lunch, where you can sample a variety of cuisines from artisanal vendors. From tacos to lobster rolls, there's something for everyone. It's a great place to grab a bite and soak in the vibrant atmosphere.

Stroll through the trendy streets of SoHo, known for its chic boutiques and unique shops. This is the perfect place to hunt for Sex and the City memorabilia and other fun souvenirs. Don't forget to check out the iconic cast-iron buildings!

No Sex and the City tour is complete without a visit to Carrie Bradshaw's iconic apartment. Snap a photo outside and relive your favorite moments from the show. It's located at 66 Perry Street, just a short walk from SoHo.
End your day with dinner at The Spotted Pig, a cozy gastropub known for its delicious burgers and rustic charm. Enjoy a hearty meal while reminiscing about your day in the city.

days.title: Final Day and Return to Washington D.C.

transit.memo: Travel back to Washington D.C. after a day of exploring.

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh fruit. It's a cozy spot perfect for families, located near Central Park.

Take a leisurely stroll across the iconic Brooklyn Bridge. Enjoy stunning views of the Manhattan skyline and the East River. It's a great way to soak in the city's atmosphere and capture some memorable photos.
Head to DUMBO and enjoy lunch at Time Out Market, where you can sample a variety of local dishes from different vendors. The views of the Manhattan skyline from here are breathtaking!
After lunch, take some time to explore DUMBO. Check out the charming streets, unique shops, and art galleries. Don't forget to visit the famous Jane's Carousel for a fun ride!
Visit the One World Observatory for panoramic views of New York City from the top of the One World Trade Center. It's an unforgettable experience that offers a unique perspective of the city.

activities.activity: Shopping for Sex and the City Merchandise
activities.description: Before heading back, indulge in some shopping for Sex and the City merchandise. Visit stores like 'The Pleasure Chest' or 'Carrie Bradshaw's' for unique finds that celebrate the iconic series.
End your day with a delicious dinner at The Smith, a lively American brasserie known for its comfort food and vibrant atmosphere. It's a great spot to reflect on your trip with family.
